def print_letter_distances(text):
    for i in range (len(text)-1):
        letter = text[i]
        nextletter = text[i + 1]
        distanceletter = ord(letter)
        distancenextletter = ord(nextletter)
        distance = abs(distanceletter - distancenextletter)
        print(letter, nextletter, distance, end = "")
    print()

def print_powers(base, n):
    pom = 1
    pom2 = base
    while pom <= n:
        print(base)
        base = base * pom2
        pom += 1

def zip_strings(text1, text2):
    tmp = ""
    minimum = min(len(text1), len(text2))
    maximum = max(len(text1), len(text2))
    biger = text1 if len(text1) > minimum else text2
    for i in range(minimum):
        tmp +=text1[i]
        tmp +=text2[i]
    for i in range(minimum, maximum):
        tmp += biger[i]
    return tmp

def find_longest_word(words_list):
    charcount = 0
    a = []
    for word in words_list:
        for char in word:
            charcount += 1
        a.append(charcount)
        charcount = 0
    bn = max(a)
    bw = a.index(bn)
    return words_list[bw]
name: find_longest_word
